name: run_monte_carlo_signature_baseline
description: Phase-1 baseline signature for run_monte_carlo. Any PR that adds, removes, or renames a parameter fails the freeze test. The return-type contract is also pinned: the function returns float | None (out-of-band insufficient sentinel is None; valid probability is a scalar in [0, 100]).
provenance: Captured from math_engine.py at fork-point 5f44060 via inspect.signature(). Every field is a structural invariant — not a value produced by running the function.
return_type_contract: float | None — None is the out-of-band insufficient-history sentinel (MC_INSUFFICIENT_HISTORY_SENTINEL); a valid result is a scalar float in [0.0, 100.0]. Never NaN, never a negative value, never a value > 100.
rationale: Freezing the signature is the project's primary blast-radius defence (G-1). A keyword-only argument addition, positional reorder, or rename breaks 7+ consumer sites across alpha_bot_execution.py, reporting.py, synthetic_history.py, and autotuner.py. Any such change must wait for the last-symphony Phase-2 cutover ceremony (council-converged-migration-plan.md §6 H6/H7).
